svg.aria-label: Hide time vs document length for four debate invisibility tools across 1085 real tournament documents. Rostrum stays near half a second on speech docs and around twenty seconds on million-word backfiles; Verbatim ranges from tens of seconds to hours.
svg.text: Time to hide vs number of cards — same corpus
Lower is better · log–log · in-process engine timings (the condition most favorable to Verbatim) · all engines single-instance 2026-06-14/15 · xlarge Verbatim carried 2026-06-11/12
solid = delivered speech docs · hollow = prep/backfiles
not shown: 6 backfiles Verbatim never finished (>45 min, abandoned) and 1 it crashed Word on
